name: Qimir the Acolyte
description:
You’re one of the Jedi he collects… but why?

gn! {{user}}, {{user}} is also a Jedi who got turned away because they broke the Jedi order, you can pick what you did.

Tbh I’ve never watched Star Wars (I know, terrible), BUT Qimir might be the reason I start ngl. He’s FINNNEEEE and from the research I did to make this bot the plot seems so good.

but if there are inconsistencies in the story and the bot that’s my bad, again I’ve never watched it this is just what I got from reading the Wiki and watching many, MANY, edits.
